html:
Exclusive to:  

Spicy Vegetable Stinger is a Crock Pot Food Item exclusive to the Hamlet DLC. It requires either a Radish/Asparagus, an Ice, and 1.5 additional Vegetables (total vegetable value of the recipe = 2.5 including Radish/Asparagus or Toma Root in Don't Starve Together). It takes 10 seconds to cook. Because it requires 4 ingredients to make, there cannot be fillers.

When consumed, it restores 3 , 25 and 33 , and takes 15 days to spoil.

Prerequisites

  • Requires:  or
  • Requires: 
  • Requires: 
  • Excludes:
  • Excludes:
  • Excludes:

Recipe

×1.5

×1.5

Examples

×3

Tips

  • If one does not have a reliable source of honey, this can be a reliable means for recovering sanity. However, the ingredients required can provide more hunger when cooked individually, so it's a trade-off one should consider when planning their diet.
  • In Don't Starve Together, if one has an Onion and a Toma Root, then Salsa Fresca should be considered instead of this dish, as it requires 0.5 less vegetable value, while having the same benefits.

Trivia

  • Vegetable Stinger was introduced to Don't Starve Together in the Warly Character Update.
  • During the Pig Fiesta event in Hamlet, Spicy Vegetable Stinger takes on a more festive appearance.

'''Spicy Vegetable Stinger''' is a [[Crock Pot]] [[Food]] [[Item]] exclusive to the ''[[Don't Starve: Hamlet|Hamlet]]'' DLC. It requires either a [[Radish]]/[[Asparagus]], an [[Ice]], and 1.5 additional [[Vegetables]] (total vegetable value of the recipe = 2.5 including [[Radish]]/[[Asparagus]] or [[Toma Root]] in ''[[Don't Starve Together]]''). It takes 10 seconds to cook. Because it requires 4 ingredients to make, there cannot be fillers.

When consumed, it restores 3 {{Hp}}, 25 {{Hunger}} and 33 {{Sanity}}, and takes 15 [[Day-Night Cycle|days]] to [[spoil]].

== Prerequisites ==
* Requires: [[File:Asparagus.png|link=Asparagus]] or [[File:Radish.png|link=Radish]]
* Requires: [[File:Ice.png|link=Ice]]
* Requires: [[File:Crock Pot Vegetables (no Mandrake).png|link=Vegetables]]
* Excludes: [[File:Meats Crock Pot.png|link=Meats]]
* Excludes: [[File:Eggs Crock Pot.png|link=Eggs]]
* Excludes: [[File:Inedible Crock Pot.png|link=Inedible]]

== {{pic|32|Cookbook}} Recipe ==
{{Recipe
|item1 = Asparaguses
|item2 = Vegetables
|count2 = 1.5
|item3 = Ice
|tool = Crock Pot
|result = Spicy Vegetable Stinger
}}
{{Recipe
|item1 = Radish
|item2 = vegetables
|count2 = 1.5
|item3 = Ice
|tool = Crock Pot
|result = Spicy Vegetable Stinger
}}
== Examples ==
{{Recipe
|item1 = Asparagus
|item2 = Carrot
|item3 = Green Cap
|item4 = Ice
|tool = Crock Pot
|result = Spicy Vegetable Stinger
}}
{{Recipe
|item1 = Radish
|item2 = Eggplant
|item3 = Corn
|item4 = Ice
|tool = Crock Pot
|result = Spicy Vegetable Stinger
}}{{Recipe
|item1 = Radish
|count1 = 3
|item2 = Ice
|tool = Crock Pot
|result = Spicy Vegetable Stinger
}}
== {{Pic|32|Prototype}} Tips ==
* If one does not have a reliable source of [[honey]], this can be a reliable means for recovering sanity. However, the ingredients required can provide more [[hunger]] when cooked individually, so it's a trade-off one should consider when planning their diet. 

* In [[Don't Starve Together|''Don't Starve Together'']], if one has an [[Onion]] and a [[Toma Root]], then [[Salsa Fresca]] should be considered instead of this dish, as it requires 0.5 less vegetable value, while having the same benefits.

== {{Pic32|Placeholder}} Trivia ==
[[File:Spicy Vegetable Stinger (Pig Fiesta).png|right]]
* Vegetable Stinger was introduced to ''Don't Starve Together'' in the [[Don't Starve Together/Version History#July 25, 2019 - Warly Character Update|Warly Character Update]].
* During the [[Pig Fiesta]] event in ''Hamlet'', Spicy Vegetable Stinger takes on a more festive appearance.
